categories.name: Prelims & site setup
categories.notes: Temporary works, site welfare, setup, access, and general contractor overheads before the main build flow starts.

categories.name: Professional fees & statutory
categories.notes: Architect, structural engineer, topographical study, ecological study, arboricultural study, pre-planning application, consultants, approvals, and other non-construction professional costs.

categories.name: Groundworks, drainage & foundations
categories.notes: Excavation, below-ground drainage, services entries, raft slab works, and external ground formation tied to the building.

categories.name: Superstructure (steel frame + structural works)
categories.notes: Primary frame, structural carpentry, and other key load-bearing elements that take the build out of the ground.

categories.name: Roofs (pitched + warm roof links)
categories.notes: Pitched roof build-ups, flat link roofs, waterproofing, and associated trims and rainwater interfaces.

categories.name: Envelope (walls/insulation/cladding/airtightness + courtyard interface)
categories.notes: External wall build-up, insulation, membranes, cladding, and the critical detailing around the courtyard edge.

categories.name: Windows & external doors (incl large sliders)
categories.notes: All glazed openings, external doors, and the major slider packages that define the courtyard and living elevations.

categories.name: M&E (ASHP, UFH, MVHR, electrical, plumbing)
categories.notes: Heating, ventilation, plumbing, consumer systems, wiring, controls, and core electrical installation.

categories.name: Internal build-up (partitions/plaster/screed)
categories.notes: Stud partitions, linings, screeds, plastering, and the work needed to turn the shell into usable internal rooms.

categories.name: Kitchen, utility & appliances
categories.notes: Cabinetry, worktops, utility room fittings, and integrated appliances where they sit outside the main M&E package. Current working assumption: Vermland cabinetry/worktops at £24k plus £15k appliance allowance.

categories.name: Bathrooms (ensuites + powder)
categories.notes: Sanitaryware, showers, bath, basins, bathroom brassware, and associated finish allowances for all bathroom spaces.

categories.name: Second-fix carpentry & joinery (doors/wardrobes)
categories.notes: Internal doors, skirtings, architraves, fitted wardrobes, and other bespoke second-fix timber elements.

categories.name: Finishes (flooring, decorating, tiling beyond baths)
categories.notes: Floor finishes now assume polished terrazzo to around 100 sqm, engineered oak to the remaining 110 sqm of the house, and a basic power-floated concrete garage floor rather than a high-spec polished finish.

categories.name: Utilities & compliance (connections/testing/certs/EV)
categories.notes: Final connections, certification, testing, EV charger provision, and close-out items needed to make the project compliant and occupiable.

categories.name: Courtyard finishing (long-term)
categories.notes: Separate long-term allowance for courtyard paving, joinery, and detailed finishing once the design is fixed.

categories.name: Landscaping (excluded for now)
categories.notes: External soft and hard landscaping beyond immediate building interfaces; currently excluded from the active build budget.

globalContingency.rules: Global pot; allocate via decisions or manual transfers later.
